records.ety: [L. commiseratus, p. p. of commiserari to commiserate; com- + miserari to pity. See Miserable.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Commiserated; p. pr. & vb. n. Commiserating.]

defs: To feel sorrow, pain, or regret for; to pity.
quotes: Then must we those, who groan, beneath the weight Of age, disease, or want, commiserate.
We should commiserate our mutual ignorance.
